summary: Phase 1 V2 External Events API testing complete. All 4 new endpoints work correctly: GET/PUT /import-settings, POST /sync, GET /. All endpoints require authentication (401 without token). Test user has no calendar connections, so CalendarSyncPanel is correctly hidden in dashboard. Dashboard features (create engagement, workspace switcher, impact card) work correctly. No regressions on settings/integrations pages.

backend_api_tests: ✅ GET /api/external-events/import-settings returns providers object (empty for user without connections)
✅ PUT /api/external-events/import-settings validates provider field (rejects invalid provider)
✅ PUT /api/external-events/import-settings returns 400 when provider not connected
✅ POST /api/external-events/sync returns results object (empty when no enabled providers)
✅ GET /api/external-events/ returns events array and providers list (empty when no enabled providers)
frontend_tests: ✅ Signin page loads correctly with login form
✅ Login flow works with test credentials (stripe-test@nlyt.io / Test123!)
✅ Dashboard stats show '0 engagements | 0 à risque'
✅ Create engagement button visible and clickable
✅ Workspace switcher works (dropdown opens, shows workspace name)
✅ Create new workspace button in dropdown
✅ CalendarSyncPanel NOT in DOM (correct - user has no calendar connections)
✅ Empty state message 'Aucun engagement pour le moment' displayed
✅ Settings page loads with all sections (Profil, Workspace, Intégrations, Paiement, Wallet)
✅ Integrations page shows Google Calendar and Outlook sections
✅ Connect buttons available for Google and Outlook calendars

critical_code_review_comments: External events routes correctly use async/await pattern
Import settings correctly returns empty providers object when no connections
CalendarSyncPanel correctly hidden when importSettings.providers is empty (line 51 in CalendarSyncPanel.js)
ExternalEventCard component ready for use when events are imported
Database indexes for external_events collection properly defined in database.py

test_credentials.note: Test user has no Google/Outlook calendar connections

seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 V2 External Events feature tested. All 4 new API endpoints work correctly. CalendarSyncPanel is hidden when user has no calendar connections (correct behavior). To test the full import flow, a user with connected Google/Outlook calendar would be needed. The ExternalEventCard component is ready but not rendered since no external events exist for the test user.

mocked_apis.note: Google/Outlook APIs are real but test user has no connections, so all endpoints return empty results (correct behavior)
